Level-5 Shaolin candy-monk — attack animations

The round mochi/sesame-ball desert monk in motion (Veo claymation, looping). You liked both attacks — here's how each moves. Tell me the motion feel, and whether he gets both (stars = quick basic, fireball = charged) or one.
Hadouken Candy-Fireball
Cups and conjures a glowing swirling candy orb between his palms — the wave-motion energy move.
Candy-Star Throw
Flicks a glowing five-point candy star with a quick arm-snap, sparkles trailing. Fast, light, multi-shot.
